name: opencode-tools
description: OpenCode plugin suite — edit, impact, verify, trace, rename, graph, changelog, search, lint, refactor

scripts.test: python test_hashline.py && python deeper_tests.py && python regression_tests.py && python stress_test.py && python test_impact.py && python test_verify.py && python test_trace.py && python test_graph.py && python test_changelog.py && python test_search.py && python test_lint.py && python test_refactor.py && python test_regression.py && python stress_tools.py
scripts.test:quick: python -c "import subprocess,sys; pyfiles={'hashline':'hashline','impact':'impact','verify':'verify','trace':'calltrace','rename':'rename','graph':'graph','changelog':'changelog','search':'search','lint':'lint','refactor':'refactor'}; [print(f'{t}:', 'OK' if subprocess.run([sys.executable, f'{pyfiles[t]}.py', '--version'], capture_output=True).returncode in (0,1) else 'FAIL') for t in pyfiles]"
